---
title: "Diagram 5: Design, Diminish & Jumpstart"
date: "2026-03-15"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

## Diagram 5: Design, Diminish & Jumpstart

Three pillars of a design framework, each with a sub-goal.

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    banner["Design, De-Risk & Jumpstart"]
    intent["Intent"]
    goals["`Reduce effort
      Increase ROI
      Fail fast`"]
    guardrails["Guardrails"]

    banner -- Design --> intent
    banner -- De-Risk --> goals
    banner -- Jumpstart --> guardrails
```
